title: Reset C tuple domain on key rotation
description: C link TX latches nonce_exhausted after terminal tuple, but the documented signing-key rotation path does not reset the counter/exhaustion state. Define atomic key rotation with a fresh persisted/random next tuple and test that old-key tuples remain isolated while new-key TX resumes.
close_reason: Reset tx_seq and nonce_exhausted in lichen_link_load_key (link_ctx.c:154-155); atomic rotation now clears latch so new key TX resumes with fresh tuple while old-key tuples stay isolated via per-pubkey replay. Existing link_crypto and link_epoch tests pass; no regression to epoch persist.
